response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK airplane_reg
ATTR airplane_reg : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR airplane_reg : varchar : FK
ATTR origin_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR destination_airport_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : varchar : PK
ATTR status_name : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK log_id
ATTR log_id : integer : PK
ATTR flight_number : varchar : FK
ATTR status_id : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY FlightCrewAssignment
PK assignment_id
ATTR assignment_id : integer : PK
ATTR flight_number : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY BaggageBelt
PK belt_code
ATTR belt_code : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_number : varchar : FK
ATTR airport_code : varchar : FK

REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=city_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airplane_reg
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_code
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1..N : FK=crew_id
REL FlightStatusLog -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL FlightStatusLog -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_id
REL BaggageBelt -> Flight : 0..1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL BaggageBelt -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=airport_code
